title: Code for "Evaluation of three rapid diagnostic tests and IgM ELISA for human leptospirosis in Colombia: a Bayesian Latent Class Analysis"
description: Analysis code (classical accuracy, Bayesian Latent Class Analysis in JAGS and Stan, prior sensitivity analysis, phase-specific MAT secondary analysis, and ROC/AUC analysis) for the evaluation of three rapid diagnostic tests and the Panbio IgM ELISA for human leptospirosis in Colombia (2015-2018), using 479 paired serum samples. No individual-level data are included.
